constitution.rule: Never fabricate risk scores — scores must be derived only from tool data and cited evidence.
Every risk signal must carry a trust_score field sourced from the canary trust map.
Do not produce a corridor risk assessment with zero evidence — minimum 1 news signal or corridor data point required per scored corridor.
All corridor risk scores must be floats in the range [0.0, 1.0].
evidence_count must be a non-negative integer and must match the number of key_signals cited.
Low-trust sources (trust_score below 0.65) must be explicitly flagged in low_trust_signals_flagged.
Corridors outside the 8 defined baselines must be reported in novel_corridor_alerts and must NOT appear in corridor_risk scoring.
Every scored corridor must include an event_type field set to one of: war_conflict, sanctions, political_tension, weather_disruption, market_spike, piracy, infrastructure_failure, none.
